design_philosophy: Premium Apple-style minimalism paired with subtle Balinese elegance. Emphasizes trust, clear user pathways (Buyer vs. Seller), generous white space, and refined typography. The layout utilizes bento-grid structures to modernize the tech e-commerce feel.

primary.description: Navy / Biru Tua. Use for sticky header background (if solid), large headings (H1/H2), and primary CTA buttons.

accent.description: Gold is for high-priority CTAs, hover states, and thin Balinese ornament lines. Teal is for secondary actions, trust icons, and grade badges.

background.description: White is the primary canvas. Soft gray is used for alternating sections to create rhythm.

text.description: Dark text for high readability. White text when placed over Navy blocks.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-[#1F3A5F]

typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Keep tight letter spacing on H1/H2.

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for major cards to keep the smooth Apple feel. Small elements use rounded-lg.
spacing_and_layout.balinese_touch: Use a subtle 1px border colored #E0A526/30 as section dividers or to frame bento grid cards. Optionally, apply a very low opacity (5%) traditional texture on the hero or footer background.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1F3A5F] text-white hover:bg-[#152842] transition-colors shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.accent_gold: bg-[#E0A526] text-white hover:bg-[#C28E20] transition-colors shadow-lg rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#1F3A5F] text-[#1F3A5F] hover:bg-[#1F3A5F] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-colors

cards.bento: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-gray-100/50 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all
cards.product: bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 border border-gray-100 flex flex-col gap-4 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform cursor-pointer

badges.grade_A: bg-[#3BAFA0]/10 text-[#3BAFA0] border border-[#3BAFA0]/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase
badges.grade_B: bg-[#E0A526]/10 text-[#E0A526] border border-[#E0A526]/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase

sections.name: Header
sections.layout: Sticky, glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl), 1px border-b border-gray-100. Navy Logo on left, Nav links center, Gold CTA right.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.layout: Centered or 2-column split. Huge H1 'Jual Beli iPhone Second Bali, Terpercaya & Fair'. Two prominent CTA side-by-side: Navy (Saya Mau Beli) and Gold (Saya Mau Jual). Background subtle texture.

sections.name: Problem vs Solution (Makelar vs Dedari)
sections.layout: 2-column Bento Layout. Left Card (Red/❌): Makelar style (low price, sketchy). Right Card (Teal/✅): Dedari style (75-90% market price, verified).

sections.name: Seller Path (Jual)
sections.layout: Split into two info cards (Jual Putus vs Titip Jual) followed by an Interactive Estimator Calculator (Dropdowns for Model, Battery Health, Condition) matching Shadcn components heavily styled.

sections.name: Buyer Path (Beli / Catalog)
sections.layout: Filterable Grid (3 or 4 columns). Product cards with clean iPhone isolated images, Grade Badges (Teal), Price, and 'Beli via WA' button.

sections.name: Grading System
sections.layout: A 4-column bento grid detailing Grade A, B, C, D criteria.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.layout: 3-step horizontal flow with connecting subtle gold dashed lines. Icons in Teal/Gold.

sections.name: Trust Signals
sections.layout: Grid of 6 minimalist icons + short text (Verified, Official, Guarantee, etc.).

sections.name: FAQ
sections.layout: Shadcn Accordion styled cleanly with Navy text.

sections.name: Footer
sections.layout: Dark theme block (bg-[#1F3A5F]) with White text and Gold subtle accents.

sections.name: Floating WhatsApp
sections.layout: Fixed bottom-right corner. Green (#25D366) or Teal (#3BAFA0) with ping/pulse animation.

image_urls.description: Person holding iPhone - Use for Seller Path/Hero
Clean white smartphone isolated - Use for Product Catalog mockups
Turned on iPhone on wooden surface - Use for Buyer Path context
Subtle Bali texture/architecture - Use with very low opacity (5%) as a background element for Hero or Footer to add the requested elegant Balinese identity without being tacky.

motion_and_interaction.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion_and_interaction.reveal: Framer Motion staggered fade-up for bento grids and product catalogs.
motion_and_interaction.hover: Apple-style slight scale-up (scale-105) on product cards. Buttons use shadow-expansion and subtle brightness shift.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for headings and 'Manrope' for body font.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for clean, premium iconography.
Ensure the layout strictly follows mobile-first principles with 1-column grids transforming to 3 or 4 columns on large screens.
All CTAs must direct to a WhatsApp URL.
Implement the Price Estimator purely in React state (no backend). Use Shadcn Select and form components heavily customized to match the Gold/Navy theme.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF blindly. White should be clean, text should be #1A1A1A, and use #F5F6F8 for section contrast.
For the 'Balinese touch', add thin borders (`border-b border-[#E0A526]/20`) or use the provided Bali texture image with `opacity-5` and `mix-blend-multiply` over the white or gray background.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, accordion triggers, calculator inputs).
